items.title: Aura Parfume - Brand Identity Web
items.description: An innovative fragrance marketing platform leveraging Contentful CMS for ultra-fast content management and WhatsApp integration for instant sales conversion. Built with a focus on deployment efficiency and modern digital content strategies.

items.title: AbsensiKu - Smart Workforce Management
items.description: A smart attendance management system designed to optimize team productivity. Featuring proactive notification systems, integrated task tracking, and direct user support to resolve operational bottlenecks in real-time.

items.title: Nusantara Go - ML-Powered Travel Discovery
items.description: An ML-powered tourism accelerator transforming how travelers discover Indonesia's natural beauty. Delivering personalized recommendations for hidden gems to support equitable national tourism growth.

items.title: Modern Notes Architecture
items.description: A deep dive into modern JavaScript scalability using Web Components and Shadow DOM. Building encapsulated note systems with high performance and reusable UI design patterns.

items.title: Bookshelf Precision Manager
items.description: A high-precision digital library management system featuring Local Storage for serverless data persistence. Prioritizing user experience in organizing personal literature intuitively.

items.title: AnimeBook Ecosystem
items.description: An interactive anime catalog blending dynamic visual design with responsive navigation. Achieving high quality standards aligned with the premium curriculum from Dicoding x DBS Foundation.

items.title: MeBest Travel Integration
items.description: A collaborative platform bridging destination insights with integrated travel transactions. Designed to amplify exposure to Indonesia's cultural heritage through unified digital solutions.

items.title: Catatanku - React Evolution
items.description: The evolution of note management into a React.js architecture. Integrating dynamic routing (React Router) and advanced state management to deliver a seamless Single Page Application experience.
